DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE; REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES IS GRANTED.
